The '''Yovshin Swordsmen''' of the [[Atrisian Empire]] developed a [[Jar'Kai/Legends|sword fighting style]] in which they wielded a [[Jar'Kai dueling saber|dueling sword]] in each hand. They dubbed the weapons "''Jar'Kai''" after the [[Atrisia/Legends|Atrisian]] [[Jar'Kai (city)|city]] where they were first crafted. The [[Jedi Order]] would adopt their style into a form of [[lightsaber combat]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Rise of the Hutt Cartel]]'' {{Mo}}
